entry.title: Κ.Ο. Νέας Δημοκρατίας: Η πρόταση Μητσοτάκη για τη συνταγματική αναθεώρηση – Αλλαγές σε 30 άρθρα
entry.summary: ND's parliamentary group debates PM Mitsotakis's proposal to revise 30 constitutional articles, covering AI, Greek language protection, raising mandatory schooling to 11 years and allowing non-state universities.

entry.title: Διηπειρωτικός πύραυλος από την Τουρκία
entry.summary: Turkey unexpectedly unveiled its first intercontinental ballistic missile 'Yildirimhan' with 6,000-km range, against the backdrop of Greek-French-Israeli defense cooperation. No test launches yet.

entry.title: Νεκρός διοικητής επίλεκτης δύναμης της Χεζμπολάχ σε ισραηλινό πλήγμα
entry.summary: Israel announced it killed a commander of Hezbollah's elite Radwan force in an airstrike on Beirut, the first Israeli strike on the capital since the ceasefire began. Two other senior Hezbollah figures were also killed.

entry.title: Νεκρός ο γιος του ηγέτη της Χαμάς που διαπραγματεύεται με το συμβούλιο Τραμπ
entry.summary: An Israeli airstrike killed the son of Khalil al-Hayya, chief Hamas negotiator in US-mediated Gaza talks. It is the fourth son of the exiled Hamas leader killed in Israeli strikes.

entry.title: Με το βλέμμα στα Στενά
entry.summary: The 5th Greece-Cyprus-Jordan trilateral summit in Amman focused on the Strait of Hormuz as the global economy's 'thermostat'. Jordan is a sensitive geopolitical link, while Egypt has lost about $10bn from reduced Suez Canal traffic.

entry.title: «Κιβωτός» – Πρόταση εισαγγελέα: Στο εδώλιο πατέρας Αντώνιος και πρεσβυτέρα για οικονομικά αδικήματα
entry.summary: A 163-page prosecutor's motion proposes that Father Antonios, the presvytera and an associate be tried for the 'Ark of the World' charity over serious financial crimes including breach of trust, embezzlement and money laundering.

entry.title: Τον Σεπτέμβριο αναμένει τις εκλογές η Χαριλάου Τρικούπη
entry.summary: PASOK leader Androulakis and the Political Council assessed September as the likeliest election date, accelerating preparations on a four-month timeline and stepping up criticism of the government.

entry.title: Οι ΗΠΑ και η Κίνα έχουν έναν κοινό εχθρό
entry.summary: The Trump-Xi summit in Beijing could mirror the 1972 Nixon-Mao milestone. AI is emerging as the shared threat requiring coordinated US-China action against malicious uses.

entry.title: Ναυάγιο στην Ανδρο: Υποψίες για μεταφορά παράνομου φορτίου
entry.summary: The 'Corsage' freighter that sank off Andros was on international shipping black-lists and was being targeted by the US Coast Guard. The Greek intelligence service is investigating possible illegal cargo.

entry.title: Αναστάτωση με τη δικογραφία για τον ΟΠΕΚΕΠΕ
entry.summary: Confusion over OPEKEPE: 9 of 11 ND MPs received summonses charging felonies, though their actual involvement concerns misdemeanors. The European Public Prosecutor blamed the error on a clerical mistake.

entry.title: Καραμανλής: Σκανδαλώδης και πελατειακής αντίληψης διαχείριση των κοινοτικών ενισχύσεων
entry.summary: Former PM Kostas Karamanlis lashes out at the handling of EU farm subsidies as 'opaque, at times scandalous and clientelist', calling for a comprehensive plan to support farmers.

entry.title: Δικαιώθηκε η Ελλάδα για την επαναγορά warrants με ρήτρα ΑΕΠ
entry.summary: Landmark legal win for Greece: the UK Supreme Court upheld the buyback of GDP-linked warrants with a face value of over €62bn, defusing a potential 'time bomb' for public finances.

entry.title: Ανοιξαν οι κάλπες στη Βρετανία
entry.summary: Polls opened in Britain for crucial local elections, the first since Labour's return to power. Reform UK and the Greens are threatening Keir Starmer, whose approval has slipped.

entry.title: Το Ισραήλ συνεχίζει τα πλήγματα στον νότιο Λίβανο – Τρεις νεκροί
entry.summary: Three killed by ongoing Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon — at Mayfadoun, Hambous and Nabatieh. Hezbollah reportedly fired rockets at Israeli forces. The ceasefire terms remain disputed.

entry.title: Σε λειτουργία στα τέλη του 2028 το διεθνές αεροδρόμιο στο Καστέλλι
entry.summary: Crete's new Kasteli international airport is now expected to open in November 2028, with construction 70% complete. It will handle 15 million passengers annually.

entry.title: Σκληρό πόκερ από Ryanair στο αεροδρόμιο Θεσσαλονίκης
entry.summary: Hardball Ryanair-Fraport standoff in Thessaloniki: the airline threatened to close its base in October and cut to just three routes, in response to airport fee hikes.

entry.title: Greek Mafia: Oι εκτελεστές του Μοσχούρη σχεδίαζαν δολοφονία γνωστού βαρυποινίτη
entry.summary: Those arrested for the murder of Greek Mafia figure Giorgos Moschouris appear to have been planning another hit on a notorious convict, having placed cameras at his lawyer's home.

entry.title: Κρήτη: Συνέχεια μεταναστευτικών ροών – Εντοπίστηκαν και διασώθηκαν 268 άτομα
entry.summary: Migrant flows to Crete continue: 268 people were located and rescued over 24 hours in five Coast Guard operations south-east of Phaistos.

entry.title: Γαλλία: Οικονομικά κίνητρα προς τις αεροπορικές εταιρείες για να μη μειώσουν τον αριθμό των πτήσεων
entry.summary: France is planning tax breaks and low-interest loans for airlines to deter them from cutting flights amid doubled jet-fuel prices. Carriers have already announced cancellations covering 2 million seats in May.

entry.title: Το Ιράν αρνήθηκε κάθε εμπλοκή στις ζημιές στο νοτιοκορεατικό πλοίο
entry.summary: Iran denied involvement in damage to a South Korean HMM vessel in the Strait of Hormuz. Trump had blamed Iran for the attack. Seoul will confirm the cause once the ship is towed for inspection.
